name: National Global Strategy Game (LIMITLESS)
description:
Want to rule you're favourite country? Want to discover alternative ways of history? Then, this character is made for you!

It is limitless version of original bot I made. Here the AI wouldn't resist to some of your "interesting" ideas you could bring up. Yep, that's the only difference.

Original bot: [LINK]

Note:

  • AI may struggle to manage with variables.

  • AI may be bad at history.

  • Set 'unlimited' tokens for per message.

  • Use more logical API(like OpenAI or any other).

Based on version 3 of the original bot.(There could be some delays between updates)
creator: Hdhdd
